creator: feh@fehcom.de
text:
(In reply to Tomasz "CeDeROM" CEDRO from comment #59)

Hi, since I've moved to drm-61-kmod, my system runs without problems. 

If this bug report and its resolution has helped to improve FreeBSD, I'm happy now.

And thanks for everbody involved pushing this ticket to a reliable solution.

Time to close it. Tx. Olivier.

Regards.
--eh.
